title: Gaddaar
desc: A wealthy businessman's son manipulates a loyal friend into his personal schemes, but unexpected love and rising tensions threaten to unravel their lives.

title: Phool Aur Kaante
desc: Love leads Ajay down a new path when he is expected to inherit his father's criminal empire, bringing along perils that could either tear their family apart or solidify their bond.

title: Gopi Kishan
desc: Policeman Gopi's doppelganger Kishan, who is a criminal, learns about the former and uses his identity to his advantage as he tries to find his father. This results in Gopi reaping the benefits.

title: Sanam Teri Kasam
desc: Sunny travels to Shimla for a job opportunity, unaware that the employer is his estranged father, Manoharlal. However, tensions rise when a villain, greedy for his father's wealth, hatches a plot.

title: Jaal: The Trap
desc: Ajay, a commando, is forced to kidnap Anita, the home minister's daughter, to free his girlfriend Neha from the clutches of terrorists. In the process, he uncovers a shocking revelation.

title: Gadar: Ek Prem Katha
desc: During Partition, Tara and Sakina marry and enjoy a happy life together. However, Sakina's father forces her to remain in Pakistan, tearing the couple apart.
